GitHub
JetBrains Plugin

Appearance

EasyApiSimplifies API Development

Export APIs from IntelliJ IDEA to Postman, Markdown and more

Get Started
View on GitHub

Multi-Language Support

Java, Kotlin, and Scala support out of the box

Multi-Framework Support

Spring MVC, Spring Boot, Spring WebFlux, Feign, JAX-RS (Quarkus/Jersey)

Multi-Channel Export

Export to Postman, Markdown, Curl, and IntelliJ HTTP Client

Rich Extensibility

Supports a wide range of configurations and extensions to cater to diverse frameworks and code specifications

Built-in API Calling Tool

A compact built-in API calling tool for quick debugging

Validation & Serialization

Full support for javax.validation, Jackson, Gson, and Swagger annotations

Released under the Apache-2.0 License.
